name: flow-proxy
description: Flow: a fast, transparent, hostable web proxy gateway

scripts.check: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/urlPolicy.js && node --check src/cache.js && node --check src/codec.js
scripts.check:merge-markers: sh -c "if rg -n '<<<<<<<|=======|>>>>>>>' src ui public test; then echo Merge-conflict markers found; exit 1; else echo No merge markers found; fi"
